mapper.select: SELECT * FROM asset ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE asset SET asset_code = #{assetCode}, asset_name = #{assetName}, model = #{model}, category_id = #{categoryId}, location_id = #{locationId}, dept_id = #{deptId}, unit = #{unit}, user_id = #{userId}, image = #{image}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM asset WHERE asset_code LIKE #{prefix}
